name: Brantwood Park
description: Brantwood Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, MD. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Calvert Regional Park
description: Calvert Regional Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North East, MD. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Elkton Indoor Tennis
description: Elkton Indoor Tennis is a place to play pickleball in Elkton, MD. There are 10 indoor asphalt courts. You’ll have to create your own lines, but portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and locker rooms.

name: Elkton NCC
description: Elkton NCC is a place to play pickleball in Elkton, MD. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
fees: Fee required — Free for Elkton residents, $5 for non-residents

name: Gary J. Arthur Community Center
description: Outdoor courts:  8 dedicated courts, plus 8 lined on tennis courts bring nets. Howard County maintained facility, open to public

name: Kilbirnie Playground
description: Come play pickleball at Kilbirnie Playground in United States, MD! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: LevelUp Sports & Athletics Club
description: Come play pickleball at LevelUp Sports & Athletics Club in Elkton, MD! There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, food, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: Marina Park
description: Come play pickleball at Marina Park in Elkton, MD! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Marriotts Ridge High School
description: The lines for the court are so light, you can hardly see them at all
open_play_schedule: courts available on evenings and weekends during school days (except during tennis season); courts available in the summer

name: Montgomery TennisPlex
description: Montgomery TennisPlex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, MD. There are 18 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 10 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Rising Sun Middle School
description: Rising Sun Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rising Sun, MD. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Riverwood Park
description: Riverwood Park is a place to play pickleball in United States, MD. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: The Basketball Lab
description: Basketball Lab is a place to play pickleball in Elkton. There are 2 indoor hardwood courts with tape lines and portable nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Court reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Western Regional Park
description: 8 permanent courts and 8 lined courts, where you bring your net.

name: YMCA of Cecil County
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of Cecil County in Elkton, MD! There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, locker rooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
